Jagged obsidian rocks pierce moonlit waters, silver spray catching lunar glow as waves crash endlessly against stone.
Fog-shrouded cove entrance where black water meets rolling mist, swallowing all sound except distant tidal whispers.
Shattered hull timbers scattered across cliff-base boulders, brass fittings corroded green beneath wheeling gulls overhead.
Tidal cave mouth exhaling phosphorescent mist with each wave, eerie blue-green light dancing across wet walls.
Wind-carved promontory jutting over storm-darkened seas at twilight, lightning illuminating distant rain curtains intermittently.
Crumbling lighthouse on desolate island, its extinguished beacon tower listing toward the hungry waves below.
Solitary sea stack rising from churning white foam, salt-scoured surface gleaming wet under gathering storm clouds.
Secret grotto hidden behind cascading waterfall, tranquil interior pool reflecting flickering sunlight through falling water.
Volcanic black sand shore steaming where hot springs meet cold surf, sulfurous mist drifting across obsidian.
Ancient stone pier disappearing beneath rising tide, barnacle-crusted pillars crumbling into foam-streaked green water.
Granite needle formations under waning crescent moon, shadows pooling deep between rocks where currents run treacherous.
Dense sea-fog blankets dawn-lit cove, pale golden light barely penetrating the thick marine layer above still.
Broken masts and torn sailcloth wedged between sunrise-gilded rocks, morning tide revealing yesterday's catastrophe newly.
Shallow cave resonating with thunderous wave-echoes, violet bioluminescent algae coating every surface in ethereal glow.
Weathered cliff edge overlooking slate-gray afternoon sea, cold wind driving horizontal rain across exposed stone ledges.
Abandoned beacon-tower silhouetted against blood-red sunset, foundation stones undermined by decades of relentless erosion.
Twin sea stacks flanking narrow channel, midday sun revealing submerged rocks waiting beneath deceptively clear water.
Curtain of spring-water cascading over grotto entrance, interior sanctuary lit by shafts of dappled forest light.
Midnight-black beach under starlit sky, geothermal pools bubbling softly where volcanic heat meets cool ocean breeze.
Submerged wharf emerging at low tide, rotting timber pilings encrusted with decades of undisturbed marine growth.
Sharp limestone formations under harvest moon, orange light painting jagged edges while autumn storms gather on horizon.
Pre-dawn mist concealing reef-scattered shallows, treacherous coral heads lurking invisible beneath mercury-smooth surface tension.
Kelp-draped wreckage against afternoon rocks, bronze ship's bell still hanging silent from splintered beam fragment.
Cave ceiling dripping with luminous organisms, each incoming wave creating cascades of sparkling turquoise droplets.
Storm-lashed headland at dusk, violet sky behind black silhouette of rocks where desperate ships founders.
